intents.response: Hello! 👋 Welcome to the GES R.H. Sapat College of Engineering Helpdesk. How can I help you today?
Goodbye! 👋 Have a great day!

GES R.H. Sapat College of Engineering, Management Studies & Research is located in Nashik, established in 2009. It is AICTE approved, affiliated to Savitribai Phule Pune University (SPPU), ISO 9001:2015 certified, and NAAC accredited with B++ grade.
The full name is Gokhale Education Society's R.H. Sapat College of Engineering, Management Studies and Research, Nashik – 422005.
The college was established in the year 2009 and is run by the Gokhale Education Society.
The college is affiliated to Savitribai Phule Pune University (SPPU), Pune, and is approved by AICTE, New Delhi.
The college is NAAC accredited with B++ grade (2025–2030) for the 2nd cycle and is ISO 9001:2015 certified.
UG programs offered: Computer Engineering, Artificial Intelligence & Data Science, Civil Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Electronics & Telecommunication Engineering, and Mechanical Engineering.
PG programs offered: M.E. in Computer Engineering, Digital Systems, Mechanical Engineering Design, Power Electronics & Drives, and MCA (Faculty of Engineering).
The institute offers 6 UG and 5 PG programs with a total UG intake of 708 students per year, along with MCA.
The Computer Engineering & AI/DS department offers B.E. in Computer Engineering and AI & Data Science, and M.E. in Computer Engineering. Visit: ce.ges-coengg.org
The Mechanical Engineering department offers B.E. in Mechanical Engineering and M.E. in Mechanical Engineering Design. Visit: me.ges-coengg.org
The Electrical Engineering department offers B.E. in Electrical Engineering and M.E. in Power Electronics & Drives. Visit: ee.ges-coengg.org
The Electronics & Telecommunication Engineering department offers B.E. in E&TC and M.E. in Digital Systems. Visit: etc.ges-coengg.org
The Civil Engineering department offers B.E. in Civil Engineering. Visit: civil.ges-coengg.org
AI & Data Science is offered as a B.E. program under the Computer Engineering & AI/DS department. More info at: ges-coengg.org/ai-ds-department-home
MCA (Faculty of Engineering) is a post-graduate program offered by the college. Visit: mca.ges-coengg.org for more details.
HOD of Computer Engineering & AI/DS: Dr. D. V. Patil (PhD, Computer Engineering). 📧 dipak.patil@ges-coengg.org | headcomp@ges-coengg.org
HOD of Mechanical Engineering: Dr. P. B. Nehe (PhD, M.Tech – IIT Bombay). 📧 prashant.nehe@ges-coengg.org
HOD of Electronics & Telecommunication Engineering: Dr. S. P. Agnihotri (PhD, Control System – COEP Pune), also serves as Vice-Principal. 📧 santosh.agnihotri@ges-coengg.org
HOD of Electrical Engineering: Dr. M. K. Chaudhari (PhD – SVNIT Surat, M.E. Control System). 📧 mandar.chaudhari@ges-coengg.org
HOD of Civil Engineering: Dr. N. D. Chaudhari (PhD, M.E. Civil Water Management). 📧 narhari.chaudhari@ges-coengg.org
HOD of MCA (Faculty of Engineering): Dr. Mrs. Poonam A. Chaudhari (PhD, M.E. Computer Engineering). 📧 poonam.chaudhari@ges-coengg.org
HODs at RHSCOE: CE/AI-DS – Dr. D.V. Patil | Mech – Dr. P.B. Nehe | E&TC – Dr. S.P. Agnihotri | Electrical – Dr. M.K. Chaudhari | Civil – Dr. N.D. Chaudhari | MCA – Dr. Poonam A. Chaudhari.
FY Engineering Fees (A.Y. 2025-26) – General Category: ₹70,000/year (Tuition: ₹61,565 + Development: ₹8,435). A one-time deposit fee of ₹1,000 is also applicable.
FY Engineering Fees (A.Y. 2025-26) – OBC/EWS Category: ₹39,218/year (Tuition: ₹30,783 + Development: ₹8,435). One-time deposit: ₹1,000.

FY Engineering Fees (A.Y. 2025-26) – VJDT/NT/SBC: Only Development Fee of ₹8,435 applies (Tuition: ₹0). SC/ST and TFWS categories: Only ₹8,435 (Development Fee). Girls with Free Education scheme: ₹8,435 only.
Under the Free Education for Girls scheme, girl students in FY Engineering pay only the Development Fee of ₹8,435/year. The rest of the tuition is covered by the government scheme.
M.E. (PG) Fees (A.Y. 2025-26) – General: ₹51,000/year | OBC/EWS: ₹28,573 | VJDT/NT/SBC: ₹6,145 (Dev. Fee only) | SC/ST: ₹0 | Girls Free Education: ₹6,145. One-time deposit: ₹1,000.
MCA (A.Y. 2025-26) Fees – General: ₹51,500/year | OBC/EWS: ₹28,853 | VJDT/NT/SBC: ₹6,205 (Dev. Fee only) | SC/ST: ₹0 | TFWS/Girls: ₹6,205. One-time deposit: ₹1,000.
A one-time deposit fee of ₹1,000 is applicable for all programs (FY Engineering, DSY, MCA, and M.E.) at the time of admission.

keywords: do I pay less with scholarship
intents.response: Scholarship/Free-ship benefits apply only if students submit the online application and it is approved by the Government of Maharashtra. Until approval, students must pay the full General Category fees.
NRI seat fees are not applicable at RHSCOE as per the current fee structure for A.Y. 2025-26.
You can download the official fee structure PDFs for A.Y. 2025-26 from: ges-coengg.org/fee-structure/ — includes FY Engg, DSY, MCA, and M.E. fee documents.

The college has Boys' Hostel (120 seats) and Girls' Hostel (120 seats). Facilities include RO water, solar hot water, free Wi-Fi, gym, pure veg mess (Mon–Sat: breakfast, lunch, dinner; Sunday: breakfast & lunch), and 3-bed rooms with cupboards.
Boys' Hostel Rector: Dr. S. P. Agnihotri | Girls' Hostel Rector: Dr. Mrs. M. S. Joshi.
The hostel mess serves pure vegetarian food. Mon–Sat: Breakfast, Lunch & Dinner. Sunday: Breakfast & Lunch only.
Yes! The college hostel provides free Wi-Fi connectivity to all residents along with RO drinking water and solar-heated water for bathing.
The college has a Manodarpan & NSPS Counselling Cell. Nodal Officers: Dr. J. M. Sonawane and Dr. Mrs. S. G. Khadilkar. National Toll-Free Helpline: 844 844 0632.
For mental health support, you can call the National Toll-Free Helpline: 📞 844 844 0632 (Manodarpan initiative by Ministry of Education, Govt. of India). Available 24x7.
The college offers the 'Swami Vivekanand Suraksha Yojana' — a student insurance scheme initiated by the Government of Maharashtra. Visit svyuvasuraksha.org for details.
The Principal of RHSCOE is Dr. S. S. Sane. 📞 0253-2311842 | ✉️ principal@ges-coengg.org
The Vice-Principal of RHSCOE is Dr. S. P. Agnihotri, who also serves as Head of the E&TC Engineering Department. ✉️ santosh.agnihotri@ges-coengg.org
The First Year (FE) Coordinator is Dr. P. P. Wani. ✉️ pankaj.wani@ges-coengg.org

The Women's Grievance Redressal Cell (Vishakha) handles complaints related to gender-based issues. 'She BOX' Nodal Officer: Dr. Mrs. S. G. Khadilkar. Visit ges-coengg.org/womens-grievance-redressal-cell for details.
The college has a dedicated SC/ST Committee to address concerns and support students from SC/ST communities. Visit ges-coengg.org/sc-st-cell for more info.
The college has a 24x7 Helpline for students. Visit ges-coengg.org/help-line-24-x-7 for the helpline contact details.
Fee structure for Direct Second Year (DSY/Lateral Entry) for A.Y. 2025-26 is available at: ges-coengg.org/fee-structure/ — download the DSY fee PDF for category-wise details.
The college follows a strict Code of Conduct and Code of Ethics for all students. Visit ges-coengg.org/code-of-conduct or download the ethics document from the website.
